name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Team Hunt had another constructive week this week and our achievements would not be possible without the support of people like you. We are building incredible momentum to turn the 7th District red this November. These next few months are going to fly by, and I am confident that the foundation we have built together has my campaign well-positioned to win.

On Monday, I released a new digital advertisement, "Our Energy Future." Our oil and gas industry has brought unprecedented growth and prosperity to Houston. Our leaders in government need to recognize that our greatest potential for innovation and economic advancement lies in our industries, where hardworking Houstonians forge a brighter future that benefits all Americans.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0a0e47e0d0ea482b8b7da3728c19bf20&_e=UCxJPq7EUriZNbTNR17Z2GbSNxYTuP_pmCsB6883QJKMenpsCSQ2eFmUH4b_dSMq5Z4E-VN5nIUCWryDMspBWzLJoggEoWoCNaAAgK61uu7-5SM1LcfrI1GWg72RY5JN98ALS46Iv5oHxNl_H0tSNNWqojDQ6Dw7j8l5IgNdCZSJf5kHK5g5mlP29nGv0DyYAfd_ztCgqpuNYRoHsJUadlOYLnloYMXwa5UkQxgHuGyRmMQ9PrUEswTmw74sb0i-MPmIMSXfbapBrP0Sk3-SgO200mJ-5a8R4t7G26Sia-UVVpur6mA9BM2pLIQQlxEg)

On Tuesday, I was humbled to receive Council Member Jay Smyre's endorsement in my campaign for the 7th District. I look forward to working with local leaders like Council Member Smyre to build trust between our law enforcement officers and our communities. Together, we will solidify the conservative values that have brought growth and prosperity to our city.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0a0e47e0d0ea482b8b7da3728c19bf20&_e=UCxJPq7EUriZNbTNR17Z2GbSNxYTuP_pmCsB6883QJKMenpsCSQ2eFmUH4b_dSMqkzV4DAK8rBTQ0eHAVs3oC1cSpUjBYRBez_CN24YIpqz1lRF4Jj-5KE6ZC475fb7U0cJNgSD70MMsMi0QvocsjiH-zDmdKu9CuJA61pYquI1QmNkJHbDiH4NiKcZrGjLUWTCFSVX51xiIPu_akswYz4g8qMHBqiSDi3Mf0-dI3TJrQhJLCaZ0JskuINIci6FFMkjDm9CxWlQuNfu6DC8_QXRYMMdM2beMSoq-meeNjUJWt-rCbrlYD-2v44JMCRFp)

As you may have heard, I tested positive for the coronavirus on Wednesday. I remain asymptomatic and feel healthy and I'm following the advice of medical professionals and isolating at home. Although I am going to be quarantined at home for the next couple of weeks, my campaign is still safely charging full speed ahead. I am humbled by the outpouring of kindness and concern Emily and I have received, and I encourage you to keep in mind our first responders and medical professionals who are fighting this virus on the front lines.

Team Hunt hasn't missed a beat as we continue to fortify our campaign to bring impactful change to Texas' 7th District. I am so glad you have decided to join Team Hunt. Your continued support makes our mission possible.

Thank you,
Wesley

P.S. If you would like a yard sign, please email us and someone from Team Hunt will be happy to deliver a Hunt for Congress yard sign to you as soon as possible!

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0a0e47e0d0ea482b8b7da3728c19bf20&_e=UCxJPq7EUriZNbTNR17Z2A1lq7iR7cdFp4RcMMelWVIxr1-4fA0kYtN78Dnyhpn3YgRzJ3A9hBJNWIjepREYblj-fKWMcrvmsydgJJsffBG9uROt8_PSQ4HOcA13on3IS-MeHKmh5JAIJepEuFhrVJ_p4Ow27Hex7gAejNGj_i78hYWpqZOqAhC2H-k00q6iSRsLW4t0BrfUTIrl5KLcuk5jRTLaJ0yyY-5ddbjgeNrFb3TPIqpygl8uB2Np9IyXa8wJM_C_QTvx1hJ8CFpYXzNdnqoNu-XXHSITnMOj1Ig%3D)****
---

---

Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=0a0e47e0d0ea482b8b7da3728c19bf20&_t=hAKsJi-nc083VnDgUA-bnGsM3clVf0O4qYe6gZ8Qsh-0YEEJuSZ_qnmjsPSjhixOE0XLjSaNrtnytd_4hmgxb4WGLdZSkVHLMZC1P72jsovlzX7qdjeBRECA5bKQYslrZ28kFDXzN_DWdhdt7ydkFWVsAzrdTkSUSrqwvcv5teE%3D).

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: With the election quickly approaching, I'd love to connect with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I do hope I get the chance to thank you personally. |
---
Peter -- it feels like it was just yesterday that we launched this campaign for President and the battle for the soul of the nation.

Through it all, grassroots supporters like you have kept the faith and kept this campaign running strong, sometimes even against all odds.

When we entered a general election facing a big financial deficit compared to Donald Trump, you all stepped up and have helped us get pretty darn close to closing that gap. I'm so grateful for all of you.

**Now, today marks 93 days until election day. We're almost there, Peter, but we're going to need your help to get across the finish line and win this thing.**

So as a way to show my appreciation for the grassroots team who is making all of our hard work possible, my team is going to select a few folks who chip in through this email today to get on my next call list.

[**Peter, will you chip in $5 or anything you can spare today? With the election quickly approaching, I'd love to give you a call and hear your thoughts »**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| [$50 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&express_lane=true")

| [$250 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&amount=250&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&express_lane=true")

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS")
---
Folks like you, chipping in a few dollars at a time, have fueled our campaign since day one, Peter.

In fact, 97% of our campaign's contributions are directly from grassroots supporters like you.

It makes me so proud. _Because that's how a campaign should be run._

I wish I could personally thank each and every one of you who have funded our work to make this campaign possible. That's the truth. But, I do hope I get the chance to thank you personally, Peter.

**Chip in $5 or whatever you can today, and you may hear my appreciation directly over the phone:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Get-on-Joes-Call-List**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS")

Thank you again. We can win this if we keep standing together.

_Joseph R. Biden Jr._
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48cf/2860842192/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48ce/2860842192/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48cd/2860842192/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48cc/2860842192/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48cb/2860842192/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48ca/2860842192/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c9/2860842192/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c8/2860842192/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c7/2860842192/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c6/2860842192/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c9/2860842192/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c5/2860842192/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c8/2860842192/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0a/1cd0ac28/17a3deea3/357d48c4/2860842192/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: New Ad Alert, Dr. Manny for Senate
subject: Hagerty caught supporting BLM - and hiding it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
Manny has NEVER supported Black Lives Matter. But Hagerty’s company has.
---
| |
---|---|---
| **NEW AD ALERT: "Consider the Source"** [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhlhult-ojdkijhkdh-y/) [WATCH NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhlhult-ojdkijhkdh-j/) Friend, at this point, I’m sure you’ve seen some of Bill Hagerty’s incredibly dishonest ads trying to paint Dr. Manny as a BLM supporter. We don’t like responding with negative information, but we had to get you the truth: fact is, Hagerty has been sitting on the board of a company supporting Black Lives Matter - and he didn’t resign until two weeks ago when he got caught. **So at the same time Hagerty was attacking Manny on BLM, he was making money off a company SUPPORTING Black Lives Matter. And that’s not all: the company gave Hagerty over $22,000.** [WATCH THE AD NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhlhult-ojdkijhkdh-t/) Thank you for your support, from all of us here at Team Manny. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: SPECIAL ALERT: Join Me Tonight to Discuss COVID-19
body:
| Today, Monday, at 6:45 p.m., I'm hosting a Telephone Town Hall with Dr. Kathleen Neuzil, a public health and vaccine development expert and professor at the University of Maryland School of Medicine.

On the call, we'll share updates on the battle against COVID-19, including the latest information about ongoing efforts in Congress to provide the next round of emergency relief to address health care needs and the economic distress felt by so many workers, families, and businesses. We will take your questions on everything from the recent spike in cases, to progress toward a vaccine, to legislative proposals to help weather the economic storm, to the steps necessary to ensure schools can safely deliver a high-quality education to all students, and other areas of pressing concern.

You can sign up to join the call, or stream it live, at [vanhollen.senate.gov/live](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15520.18632682.4745618.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2flive&redir_log=942008812194262). I hope you're able to join us tonight!

Chris Van Hollen
---

| Peter,
America has ONE goal, ONE national anthem, ONE unified destiny, and ONE future for our posterity. Peter, I hate to tell you this, but the future of our nation is dependent upon the decisions we make right now,
We need strong leaders in Congress to fight back against the radical left and their destructive agenda. Lee Zeldin and I are hosting a Zoom call on Tuesday, August 4th, from 1:20-2pm, to discuss what's going on right now in our country and regarding our strategy to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi. [Chip in $20 for 2020 to RSVP>>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rLzFr4U94HxL-S5tNABBogYYWtPqgUQpxxDPrmwipiNEUQLxJGJEUR-m2nLuXeVkPX7WYnjJspz3bmbpeFDeu1uqrWJa78lu3TgXx4QIaE23UJSHPwvWTIaD-gXnY0Oyr9d3lm1eksUvx-b0yuaYX7BjLeBnRHrr69JdnO-tv0NuZkAJEOK9DQ==&c=0nKgW-7QyPwORm8izIJFAv0iyZsx9DuJSkzDPb_ok1ftgRJjw3UXoA==&ch=uQL3ev2KU4c5bvoI3f_T_SFN_9459WRSVRvwYNt5HQnZsUQs6PI1lg==)

body:
Last week, we set a very ambitious goal to raise $15,000 by July 31 for our voter turnout operation. I’m thrilled to say we surpassed that goal, thanks to your support.

|

| | Thank you for supporting our campaign, friends. Last week, we set a very ambitious goal to raise $15,000 by July 31 for our voter turnout operation. I’m thrilled to say we surpassed that goal, thanks to your support. We set goals like these because we know that victory in November depends on voter turnout. With the money we raised, we will be able to get the word out, help get folks registered, and educate everyone about how to vote safely and securely. And because our operation is fueled by grassroots contributions from regular folks, we will never be beholden to corporate PACs or special interests. So, thank you again for your support, and thank you for allowing us to run a people-centered campaign. We wouldn’t be here without you. name: Kat Cammack
subject: I understand what our small businesses need
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,
Small businesses truly are the backbone of the American economy. I have been in the small business sector my entire life, starting by making my first pay-roll at the age of 16.
I understand how the crushing weight of government can impact those trying to put food on their family's dinner table and keep a roof over their head.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w8E418hXJ2c_2gr1VbMhri8N5xfefh4ZXiJ0dZdb5UTfg_KfpwpMlwiuCE2ngVcjBblMFoZ7dlu9dCV2x8E5EnASBlLXaJJ9kb4lT-d_NFs387D3kC5TQqtHiosu72zw-jiMTMjN9O0yhNRFL11udA==&c=lbJlAaX4aV0tzHw5Nuntsykkdx-aTnPsWj6L7MvK-bfNkMJFqZH70w==&ch=V8ZGfVfw7zdidNmZhZsM32z8h0_2pO-H5Lggxxx9EIlv5afu8H7Tkw==)
---
|
[Please take a moment to watch my story.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w8E418hXJ2c_2gr1VbMhri8N5xfefh4ZXiJ0dZdb5UTfg_KfpwpMlwiuCE2ngVcjBblMFoZ7dlu9dCV2x8E5EnASBlLXaJJ9kb4lT-d_NFs387D3kC5TQqtHiosu72zw-jiMTMjN9O0yhNRFL11udA==&c=lbJlAaX4aV0tzHw5Nuntsykkdx-aTnPsWj6L7MvK-bfNkMJFqZH70w==&ch=V8ZGfVfw7zdidNmZhZsM32z8h0_2pO-H5Lggxxx9EIlv5afu8H7Tkw==)

Especially today, in the wake of the COVID-19 crisis, we have to stand with those in small business, here at home and across the Nation. We are the country of freedom, opportunity, and innovation.
It is time that we deregulate American enterprise and allow our job creators to grow on their own. I will fight to slash over-regulation, lower taxes, and allow small businesses to flourish.

If elected, I will proudly protect and advocate for small business owners, both on Capitol Hill and right here at home in FL-03.
---
| In Liberty,
---
|
---
|
Kat Cammack Constitutional Conservative Candidate for Congress, FL-03
---

If elected, I will proudly protect and advocate for small business owners, both on Capitol Hill and right here at home in FL-03. | In Liberty, | | Kat Cammack Constitutional Conservative Candidate for Congress, FL-03 | | | == | | www.KatforCongress.com | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com powered by

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Week of August 3rd Action Items: Fight Big Tech Censorship!
body:
TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE
THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, AUG 3RD @ 1 P.M. ET » [FB.COM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjE2LTdkMDQxN2YwYjAwNjRiOWZhOWM2OTA4NGY1MGZmODQ3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3BnL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHM_bWlkPTQyNDc0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=NhZyUtYvqBak1bKkkDryVA) OR [TPP.US/LIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjE2LTdkMDQxN2YwYjAwNjRiOWZhOWM2OTA4NGY1MGZmODQ3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZT9taWQ9NDI0NzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=0-91vII8IymSkBjgv2UlIA) | |
---
After last week’s censorship by the major social media companies, this week, we must take action to combat their efforts to silence America’s doctors!
|
---
***** SHARE THE DOCTOR PRESS CONFERENCES CENSORED BY BIG TECH *****
As you may have seen or heard, videos of the press conferences Tea Party Patriots Foundation organized with doctors from all around the country last week, were censored by Big Tech, and removed from their platforms.

We have all of the videos on our website now, and you must continue to share them and spread the truth about coronavirus and available treatments. The left wants the American people so terrified about coronavirus that our country falters and fails. They would rather see people die, than report the truth, because the truth would help America recover.

You can watch the videos on our website and then share the link on social media or over email (or both!):
**[https://www.teapartypatriots.org/americas-frontline-doctors-summit](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjE2LTdkMDQxN2YwYjAwNjRiOWZhOWM2OTA4NGY1MGZmODQ3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYXMtZnJvbnRsaW5lLWRvY3RvcnMtc3VtbWl0P21pZD00MjQ3NCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=meOczeAzaybiA9eUhmdGrQ)**
|
---
**Sign the Letter About Hydroxychloroquine**
Sign our letter to President Trump, Vice President Pence, and Dr. Stephen M. Hahn, Commissioner of the FDA about Hydroxychloroquine. The letter demands the FDA immediately authorize an EUA stating that doctors are allowed to prescribe HCQ for outpatient use to treat or prevent COVID-19, and that state and local administrative authorities do not impose any requirements on the prescription of Chloroquine, HCQ, azithromycin, or other drugs intended to treat or prevent coronavirus. Sign by clicking the link below, and copy the link to share it on social media and/or over email.

Read the full text of the letter and sign it here: **[https://forms.gle/uSxD7BL9RVFtjFXq7](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjE2LTdkMDQxN2YwYjAwNjRiOWZhOWM2OTA4NGY1MGZmODQ3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvdVN4RDdCTDlSVkZ0akZYcTc_bWlkPTQyNDc0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=EyaAktivUuVUjihvhe_cxg)**
|
---
**Share the Petition Demanding Big Tech Stop Censoring Americans**
In light of Big Tech removing videos of the doctor press conferences, we’ve launched a petition calling for the tech giants to stop censoring Americans. We have a right to hear information from licensed and experienced doctors about coronavirus and available treatments so that we may make up our own minds. This is a free country, after all! Sign by clicking the link below, and copy the link to share it on social media and/or over email.

Sign the petition here: **[https://endtechcensorship.act.teapartypatriots.org](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjE2LTdkMDQxN2YwYjAwNjRiOWZhOWM2OTA4NGY1MGZmODQ3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9lbmR0ZWNoY2Vuc29yc2hpcC5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmc_bWlkPTQyNDc0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=3JwokeTmi3OeU35bX_8O_Q)**
|
---
**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of August 3rd **
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

This week, we are reading President Reagan’s speech, [“A Time for Choosing.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjE2LTdkMDQxN2YwYjAwNjRiOWZhOWM2OTA4NGY1MGZmODQ3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhZ2FubGlicmFyeS5nb3Yvc3JlZmVyZW5jZS9hLXRpbWUtZm9yLWNob29zaW5nLXNwZWVjaD9taWQ9NDI0NzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=y3l1ceD1p-OKJJ459PwCtw) Read through the speech together as a family, and then use the following questions to spur a family discussion.
* In President Reagan’s “A Time for Choosing” speech, he quotes Plutarch. “The real destroyer of the liberties of the people is he who spreads among them bounties, donations, and benefits.” In what ways is this warning still relevant today?
* How does President Reagan address Marxist views of property? In what ways has the threat of Marxist ideology become even more serious since he gave this speech in 1964?
* President Reagan believed each of us has a personal responsibility to study the issues and discuss them with others – to be engaged civically. How can these weekly civics lessons help you meet this responsibility?

You can find the text of President Reagan’s “A Time for Choosing” speech at the following link – just be sure to scroll down past their updates:
**[https://www.reaganlibrary.gov/sreference/a-time-for-choosing-speech](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjE2LTdkMDQxN2YwYjAwNjRiOWZhOWM2OTA4NGY1MGZmODQ3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhZ2FubGlicmFyeS5nb3Yvc3JlZmVyZW5jZS9hLXRpbWUtZm9yLWNob29zaW5nLXNwZWVjaD9taWQ9NDI0NzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=O5x7HtwlWkBplI3SOXuVug)**
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

clean_body: TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, AUG 3RD @ 1 P.M. ET » OR | | After last week’s censorship by the major social media companies, this week, we must take action to combat their efforts to silence America’s doctors! | *** SHARE THE DOCTOR PRESS CONFERENCES CENSORED BY BIG TECH * As you may have seen or heard, videos of the press conferences Tea Party Patriots Foundation organized with doctors from all around the country last week, were censored by Big Tech, and removed from their platforms. We have all of the videos on our website now, and you must continue to share them and spread the truth about coronavirus and available treatments. The left wants the American people so terrified about coronavirus that our country falters and fails. They would rather see people die, than report the truth, because the truth would help America recover. You can watch the videos on our website and then share the link on social media or over email (or both!): | Sign the Letter About Hydroxychloroquine Sign our letter to President Trump, Vice President Pence, and Dr. Stephen M. Hahn, Commissioner of the FDA about Hydroxychloroquine. The letter demands the FDA immediately authorize an EUA stating that doctors are allowed to prescribe HCQ for outpatient use to treat or prevent COVID-19, and that state and local administrative authorities do not impose any requirements on the prescription of Chloroquine, HCQ, azithromycin, or other drugs intended to treat or prevent coronavirus. Sign by clicking the link below, and copy the link to share it on social media and/or over email. Read the full text of the letter and sign it here: | Share the Petition Demanding Big Tech Stop Censoring Americans In light of Big Tech removing videos of the doctor press conferences, we’ve launched a petition calling for the tech giants to stop censoring Americans. We have a right to hear information from licensed and experienced doctors about coronavirus and available treatments so that we may make up our own minds. This is a free country, after all! Sign by clicking the link below, and copy the link to share it on social media and/or over email. Sign the petition here: | Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again Week of August 3rd Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. This week, we are reading President Reagan’s speech, Read through the speech together as a family, and then use the following questions to spur a family discussion. In President Reagan’s “A Time for Choosing” speech, he quotes Plutarch. “The real destroyer of the liberties of the people is he who spreads among them bounties, donations, and benefits.” In what ways is this warning still relevant today? How does President Reagan address Marxist views of property? In what ways has the threat of Marxist ideology become even more serious since he gave this speech in 1964? President Reagan believed each of us has a personal responsibility to study the issues and discuss them with others – to be engaged civically. How can these weekly civics lessons help you meet this responsibility? You can find the text of President Reagan’s “A Time for Choosing” speech at the following link – just be sure to scroll down past their updates: In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: Miryam Lipper, Communications Director
subject: Friend, there's a reason health care is so expensive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Lobbyists control Congress. |
---
Friend

**There's a reason why health care is so expensive.**

**It's because politicians allow insurance and drug companies to rip us off.**

_And as long as lobbyists for drug and insurance companies control Congress, Georgia families will have to worry a medical diagnosis could bankrupt them._

**[Democrat Jon Ossoff vows to stand up to those lobbyists in his latest TV ad. Watch it here>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e206b/5b2c1286/3e58a927/25f12a9c/1348359608/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_hc_ad?refcode=em_2020_08_03_hc_ad")** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e206b/5b2c1286/3e58a927/25f12a9c/1348359608/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_hc_ad?refcode=em_2020_08_03_hc_ad") **Jon's opponent, David Perdue, is the poster boy for this corruption.**

Perdue has taken nearly $300,000(!!!) from health industry PACs. So it's no surprise he has opposed efforts to import cheaper drugs from Canada, voted against cracking down on price gouging by drug companies, and opposes the expansion of Medicaid.

_And Perdue is still supporting the Trump Supreme Court lawsuit to overturn the ACA, which could jeopardize health care for nearly 500,000 Georgians and destroy protections for women, young people, and the 1.8 million Georgians with pre-existing conditions.

During a global pandemic!_

**Friend, we have had it with politicians serving special interests instead of the people.**

**Jon Ossoff is an anti-corruption crusader who will challenge the political influence of the insurance and drug companies -- and root out the corruption that's kept people like David Perdue in power.**

**[Right now, check out our new ad here>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e206b/5b2c1286/3e58a927/25f12a9c/1348359608/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_hc_ad?refcode=em_2020_08_03_hc_ad")**

Miryam Lipper
Communications Director
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

| | Hey -
As Dana likes to say, this campaign isn't about any one person. This campaign is part of a movement of people standing up and demanding real leadership. We aren't funded by corporate PACs, and Dana doesn't have the means to self-fund as some candidates do. We are relying on real people like you chipping in what they can.

**Let's show the strength of our grassroots movement. We are asking you to do just two things:**
1. **[Chip in just $50 to help us increase our outreach program.](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=363e565083&e=e25784ff28)**
2. **Forward this email to two friends with a note on why you support Dana and ask them to join you**.

If everyone that got this email shared with at least two friends, we would double our reach! That's how we get out the word that Dana is the better candidate for GA-11.

[Contribute now to help this campaign increase its outreach program and touch every voter in the district.](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=6846833cb4&e=e25784ff28)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Judson=20Sapp?=
subject: You're Invited to Meet Roger Stone!
body:
Trump Friend & Advisor Roger Stone Campaigns for Judson Sapp | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/judsonsapp.com/im-running-for-congress-847818?e=dc147d445f)
---
| | [ ](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=56a4014738&e=dc147d445f)
---
| |
_**Join Judson Sapp & Roger Stone!**_
---
|
Fellow Conservatives,

I wanted to send you a quick note to invite you to join me this week for a campaign rally and barbecue with my friend Roger Stone.

**Roger Stone is a close friend and former advisor to President Trump.** He has helped Republicans win elections for decades, and I'm blessed to have his support.

Hope to see you this week at one of my four events; on August 6th at the Bradford County Fairgrounds in Starke (5:30pm-7:30pm), on August 7th at the Lake Butler Community Center in Lake Butler (5:30pm-7:30pm), on August 8th at the Putnam County Shrine Club in East Palatka (Noon-2pm), or on August 8th at Spencer Farms in Orange Park (5pm-7pm).

_**Judson**_

Can you believe we are just 3 months away from Election Day?

This race is one of the most competitive "toss up" races nationwide and experts are saying this seat is most likely to flip Republican. It’s never been more crucial we elect a No Nonsense Leader in Congress who will support law & order and get our economy back on track. We have that opportunity this November with Nicole.

This election will be a pivotal moment and it is our chance to have a representative who shares the values of the district, someone who won’t back down and will be a leading voice against socialism in Washington.

[But in order to win, we must keep pace. Unlike Max Rose, Nicole's financial support comes from voters like you... not from Nancy Pelosi’s Money Machine or dark money.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=231A379A1A4833)

That’s why Nicole needs your continued support.

name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: Missing Peter's response to our summer strategy survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Team Joe supporters' input and feedback through our Summer Strategy Survey has given our campaign keen insight into how our supporters feel about the state of the race. |
---
Peter,

Over the course of the summer, Team Joe supporters' input and feedback through our Summer Strategy Survey has given our campaign keen insight into how our supporters feel about the state of the race.

[**Peter, you haven 't yet responded to this survey, and we'd really appreciate you weighing in to make sure we can directly hear your opinions on the current state of the race »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4952/2255568390/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/summer-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.03_B1_summer-strategy_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.03_B1_summer-strategy_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd") | **Name:** Peter Willis
**Responded to the Summer Strategy Survey?** No, not yet!
---
| [RESPOND NOW >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4951/2255568390/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/summer-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.03_B1_summer-strategy_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.03_B1_summer-strategy_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd")
---

**Here 's a look at what Team Joe supporters had to say in our Summer Strategy Survey:**
---
* Over 99% of all respondents say that they are fully committed to voting for Joe Biden this fall.

* Over 58% of supporters say that Joe's running mate will have a big impact on the outcome of the vote in their state -- we can't wait to share the exciting news!

* Nearly 60% of respondents said that they were not aware that Democrats and Republicans' fundraising race in this election has been neck-and-neck.

* But, over 75% of supporters say that fundraising will ultimately be either somewhat or very important to the final outcome of the race.

Peter, these results aren't complete without your response, and the summer is winding down, so please make sure to weigh in today!

**Here 's the link one more time to get started:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Summer-Strategy-Survey**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4952/2255568390/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/summer-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.03_B1_summer-strategy_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.03_B1_summer-strategy_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd")

Thanks for all you're doing,

Joe Biden HQ
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4950/2255568390/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d494f/2255568390/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d494c/2255568390/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d494b/2255568390/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4949/2255568390/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4946/2255568390/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4943/2255568390/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d493f/2255568390/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d493c/2255568390/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4939/2255568390/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4943/2255568390/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4934/2255568390/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d493f/2255568390/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba03/1cd0ac28/17a69c154/357d4932/2255568390/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: MJ Hegar
subject: One year ago in El Paso
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e89/7f51f7bc/40cc1fc3/4ef7a99c/3503642698/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

One year ago in El Paso, a hateful, heavily-armed man murdered 23 people in an attack on the Latino community.

I'm asking you to join me in saying the names of those we lost and honoring their memories. Read their names slowly, and take the time to remember that each person listed here was a human being with a family, dreams, and a future that was stolen from them.

**Jordan Jamrowski Anchondo. Andre Anchondo. Arturo Benavides. Javier Amir Rodriguez. Leo Cimpeda Campos. Maribel Hernandez. David Johnson. Angie Silva-Englisbee. Maria Flores. Raul Flores. Elsa Marquez. Luis Alfonzo Juarez. Margie Reckard. Guillermo "Memo" Garcia. Sara Esther Regalado Moriel. Adolfo Cerros Hern andez. Jorge Calvillo Garcia. Elsa Mendoza Marquez. Gloria Irma Marquez. Maria Eugenia Legarreta Rothe. Juan de Dios Velazquez Chairez. Ivan Filiberto Manzano. Teresa Sanchez. Alexander Gerhard Hoffman.**

This attack on the Latino community was fueled by white supremacist ideology. A year ago, I called on our elected leaders who amplify white nationalist rhetoric to take ownership of the impact of their words and reverse course immediately. Today, I see no change.

And when radicalized, hateful people can buy a weapon of war more easily than they can get a fishing permit, something is seriously wrong. I can't imagine the horror so many experienced that day, many of them Hispanic families on their back-to-school shopping trips. I'm a mom of two small kids, and it devastates me to even think of. We deserve a world in which our families can go shopping, to the movies, to a festival, and to school without fearing they'll lose their lives to gun violence.

But after the shooting in El Paso, Senator Cornyn said that there are some issues for which "we simply don't have all the answers." We do have answers. **What we don't have is leaders with the courage to defy the gun lobby and their party bosses to take action.**

Just two weeks later, Sen. Cornyn took a check from the NRA. Then, he refused yet again to take action on universal background checks. His political allies said the issue just didn't come up in their meeting. It just didn't come up. After 23 people died in a mass shooting in our state.

I have called on Sen. Cornyn as a constituent, as a gun owner, and as a mother to pass common-sense gun safety reforms to prevent more tragedies in Texas and in America -- but he will not listen. His ears are plugged up with money from the gun lobby. That's why we need to elect a new senator for Texas -- one who doesn't value campaign cash over their constituents' lives.

Hate will not overcome us. We are Texas. We are strong, and we won't be divided. **Today, we honor the lives of those who died in El Paso, the pain of those who were injured, the strength of the Latino community targeted by this attack, and the heartbreak of their families and community. Tomorrow, we keep up the fight.**

\-- MJ
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e89/7f51f7bc/40cc1fc3/4ef7a993/3503642698/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1849&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e89/7f51f7bc/40cc1fc3/4ef7a992/3503642698/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e89/7f51f7bc/40cc1fc3/4ef7a991/3503642698/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

We deserve a world in which our families can go shopping, to the movies, to a festival, and to school without fearing they'll lose their lives to gun violence. But after the shooting in El Paso, Senator Cornyn said that there are some issues for which "we simply don't have all the answers." We do have answers. What we don't have is leaders with the courage to defy the gun lobby and their party bosses to take action. Just two weeks later, Sen. Cornyn took a check from the NRA. Then, he refused yet again to take action on universal background checks. His political allies said the issue just didn't come up in their meeting. It just didn't come up. After 23 people died in a mass shooting in our state. I have called on Sen. Cornyn as a constituent, as a gun owner, and as a mother to pass common-sense gun safety reforms to prevent more tragedies in Texas and in America -- but he will not listen. His ears are plugged up with money from the gun lobby. That's why we need to elect a new senator for Texas -- one who doesn't value campaign cash over their constituents' lives. Hate will not overcome us. We are Texas. We are strong, and we won't be divided. Today, we honor the lives of those who died in El Paso, the pain of those who were injured, the strength of the Latino community targeted by this attack, and the heartbreak of their families and community. Tomorrow, we keep up the fight. \-- MJ | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

# Hello, Friends!

| | It looks like Kamala Harris is at Joe Biden's top of mind...
## **Peter!!!**
#### **⬇Did you see what Biden was holding at his last press conference?⬇**
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/61066265/1294036223/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2") **It looks like Kamala Harris is at Joe Biden 's top of mind... and possibly the top of his VP short list?!?!** Kamala is gaining some traction in the Vice Presidential race -- political pundits are betting on her to be the ticket to Joe's success. [**Biden 's talking points are prepped and ready should she be chosen -- but we have to know, would you support a Joe Biden & Kamala Harris ticket?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/61066264/1294036223/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Bidenrsquos+talking+points+are+prepped+a&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2") | | | [Yes!](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/61066267/1294036223/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Yes&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2")
---
| | [No!](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/61066266/1294036223/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+No&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2")

[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/61066269/1294036223/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2")
The Veepstakes are coming to a close sometime in the next week, so we have to know TODAY:[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/61066268/1294036223/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-++&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2")[**would you support the ticket if Kamala Harris is chosen as the VP candidate?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/6106626b/1294036223/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+would+you+support+the+ticket+if+Kamala+H&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2")
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d036e/72412298/4b7a4988/6106626a/1294036223/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200802_KamalaVP_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200803_KamalaVP_U2_X2")
Thanks for sharing your input on this important decision for our Party!
\-- the Voter Protection Project

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Thank you -- here's to what's next.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8112%2E868730%2Ejiq2ZS) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8112%2E868730%2Ejiq2ZS)** Thanks, and take care._ Thank you, truly -- because of you, we finished the month strong. I know that when there is so much uncertainty, and so much at stake, it's harder than ever to make time and budget for donations to campaigns like mine. That's why I'm truly so thankful for every grassroots donation -- not just last month but throughout this entire campaign. It's been almost a year since I announced I was running for reelection, and so much has changed in that year. I don't think any of us could have expected August 2020 to look and feel so different from August 2019, but I stand by what I said when I announced my candidacy back then: While we have made strong progress, there is still much work to do to build a brighter future. Because of you, that bright future is a little closer today. Very truly yours, Jay | [DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10266?t=5&akid=8112%2E868730%2Ejiq2ZS)

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: President Obama endorsed our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

I stood for American values abroad as a diplomat, serving tours in places like Iraq and Russia. And wherever I served, I had hope that we could make lasting change in those countries and build a more thoughtful global society.

That type of change is fueled by hope and action. Hope sparks action, and action sparks change. That’s the theory of change I’m banking on to win this fight in TX-22, and I know it’ll work because we’ve seen it work before.

It’s the theory of change that elected President Barack Obama. And today, I’m grateful to receive his endorsement as we fight for real representation in Texas and our country. I’m hoping I can count on you right now to chip in anything you can to our campaign so we can win in November.

Donate ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.03_spk_b1_all&amount=25

His hope for a better country brought us out of a recession, resulting in actionable and lasting change on issues like making health care more affordable for millions of Americans --and it inspired a generation of candidates willing to move the needle of progress even further.

I know that our district sorely needs someone who will fight for them and ensure we work to make health care more accessible. We need a proven leader who will stand with our community and make sure our economic recovery prioritizes working families. And we need to ensure that we restore our global standing and resume the work of building a world that centers democratic values.

I have hope that the change we’re seeking is within reach, friend .

That hope galvanizes this campaign every day -- and I am committed to ensuring we see the change we need.

Donate ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.03_spk_b1_all&amount=25

Thank you,
Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.03_spk_b1_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ef84214c-b6d5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0/62792d78-c1d5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc5MmQ3OC1jMWQ1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8rWFXcoDPdvKoN3sEBhZ_mYGre8RRfuTiWFIQK9GO_Y=&id=117373579 .

In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. | Friends,

A new poll this morning [in the Cedar Rapids Gazette](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=73bfa64088&e=16fac31a0f) has us tied at 41% with our radical opponent!

Iowans are starting to see that Rita Hart would be a puppet of the radical left and a strong proponent of their agenda. After all, she warmly embraced the principles of Cory Booker's legislation that would shut down family farms.

As a doctor, a public health official and a military veteran, I will go to work for you!

[But I need your help! Will you chip in $10, $50 or even $25 to help us defeat the radical left?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=ec52a4a2fa&e=16fac31a0f)

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

**Friend, I am truly humbled to have President Obama’s support in this campaign.** With just three months until Election Day, his endorsement is a testament to the incredible grassroots movement we’ve built together. I know we can flip this seat blue, but it’s going to take everyone doing our part to bring real change to South Central PA.

We need dedicated, passionate, and committed leaders at every level of government ready to take on the extensive challenges we are facing as a country. We have to ensure access to affordable health care, lower prescription drug costs, expand economic opportunity, and combat the COVID-19 crisis in a way that puts hard-working families and small businesses first.

**In order to do any of that, we absolutely must expand our Democratic House Majority -- and President Obama knows that PA-10 is one of the best opportunities _in the entire country_ to do so.

[Any amount you can spare, even just a few bucks, has a huge impact on our ability to build on the momentum of President Obama’s endorsement today and flip this seat blue in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18530662/231473717/727327945?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.03_b2_ed_all-nd&refcode2=b0cc7c2c-c7d5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNjN2MyYy1jN2Q1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0juGLVWnJjZjMn-aq9amIkgTXeEWocke9TW5YZ6bF2s=)** [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18530663/231473718/727327945?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.03_b2_ed_all-nd&refcode2=b0cc7c2c-c7d5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNjN2MyYy1jN2Q1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0juGLVWnJjZjMn-aq9amIkgTXeEWocke9TW5YZ6bF2s=)

\--Eugene

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: New Career Opportunities Await in Post-Virus Economy
body:
"I am living proof that the path to a given career is not always direct . . . I also had a lot of help along the way, which is why I am so excited.." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7f7e9c51d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **New Career Opportunities Await in Post-Virus Economy**

“I am living proof that the path to a given career is not always direct . . . I also had a lot of help along the way, which is why I am so excited about the ‘Find Something New’ workforce readiness campaign,” Energy Secretary Dan Brouillette writes in _The Cincinnati Enquirer_.

“Supporting and empowering the American worker is a major focus for President Trump . . . This workforce readiness campaign builds on that strong record of support, ensuring workers recover from these unprecedented changes in the job market.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f3908bc236&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [Visit FindSomethingNew.org for more information.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=057cf5ad89&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration is including a new letter from President Trump in its upcoming ‘Farmers to Families Food Boxes’ delivery program with information on the latest government coronavirus guidelines . . . [The letter will] help ensure information on COVID-19 best practices will be received by millions of people in the most vulnerable communities,” John Roberts and Alex Pappas report for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0ed5aebd8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump has demonstrated to Russia that he means what he says about putting ‘America First.’ If recently reported allegations of Russian malign activity toward Americans in Afghanistan prove true, Russia knows from experience that it will pay a price—even if that price never becomes public,” National Security Adviser Robert O’Brien writes in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=821dca0cb9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

Peter, did you know that President Trump endorsed my campaign for Congress?

Just look at the tweet! I could not be more honored.

[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dec141faba0343548cdd3b4a312380ce&_e=iTUFHBDDPSWGnYb6xXJ94dnu_aU1cZTt-e68xVAoWdKdOKFIa0FjaHTY6ZkHL11KWlXvlCsJACcz6VpIZFK84JesuAlddgbW3E2XEMYDltqZnfZeZdrnoTae3uBZtQCHPYaUUc4a7z6c93asTSSYl5C8H6ERnOFWxkNq07zRrYH05vY_WQkuSOK_fhXD3_6D0unZRFRl_sZkdvjKaYa6Yu1sxDoKMWTlNhYjXO6a2JkClbC9dTYZqetepp-LLYInJXcaTD1bVSNlw2Av-M-nLXTLkDWEFtlS07f8GkHULqwpWzb8WDEUoOodKs9SJHPsnsfy067hpfdvM5UuWpJKjdRB2H4Cjxs_W2vEc17vCFlvoYmbeU_Fm8C0BBd2A3ckiIby74ugzGiMI4s6dN6R_UDrKp-aIq0kpTyAR6Vp-QzZ-kM-iGBi62g-yvdDYP8SbPUYd4sX2WMOqcubKtseILeRk_p6dOY_wfs4cFzPYrde4m8C-FM3l5fimXcGABVa)

Peter, when I was in Congress, I worked closely with President Trump to deliver real results for the people of Upstate New York. With his support, I was able to deliver historic tax reform, dramatically reduce burdensome and unnecessary regulations, provide increased funding to Upstate New York’s military assets, and so much more.

Through all of the opposition, the partisan witch hunt, and the obstruction, President Trump has kept his promises and improved the lives of Upstate New Yorkers. Now, I want to get back to working alongside him to build on what we’ve started.

**But I need strong members of my team to help me get there. That’s why I’m reaching out now.**

**[Will you join President Trump today and become an OFFICIAL member of Team Claudia?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dec141faba0343548cdd3b4a312380ce&_e=iTUFHBDDPSWGnYb6xXJ94dnu_aU1cZTt-e68xVAoWdKdOKFIa0FjaHTY6ZkHL11KWlXvlCsJACcz6VpIZFK84JesuAlddgbW3E2XEMYDltqZnfZeZdrnoTae3uBZtQCHPYaUUc4a7z6c93asTSSYl5C8H6ERnOFWxkNq07zRrYH05vY_WQkuSOK_fhXD3_6D0unZRFRl_sZkdvjKaYa6Yu1sxDoKMWTlNhYjXO6a2JkClbC9dTYZqetepp-LLYInJXcaTD1bVSNlw2Av-M-nLXTLkDWEFtlS07f8GkHULqz4z8iPanEj8Uvufh1zKOBpTD98WSOO4olct-j3r_-F5KEmxZemfC9eO7Os2t9bLm3OBQmajoMOUlwFfxZ8fXkVZaYdZnKjoF9lMOq_tzdmzzj_t21lLtmxOlpRnnJXd08nIerExBgb37AYwoGk6vehPwXFK0sGuUmJMLOAxrP9uMeftCbhagF1V48MGHr6eGbHOijAZgRK9Ea5-ItOr2Qs)**
[ **YES: Join the team** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dec141faba0343548cdd3b4a312380ce&_e=iTUFHBDDPSWGnYb6xXJ94dnu_aU1cZTt-e68xVAoWdKdOKFIa0FjaHTY6ZkHL11KWlXvlCsJACcz6VpIZFK84JesuAlddgbW3E2XEMYDltqZnfZeZdrnoTae3uBZtQCHPYaUUc4a7z6c93asTSSYl5C8H6ERnOFWxkNq07zRrYH05vY_WQkuSOK_fhXD3_6D0unZRFRl_sZkdvjKaYa6Yu1sxDoKMWTlNhYjXO6a2JkClbC9dTYZqetepp-LLYInJXcaTD1bVSNlw2Av-M-nLXTLkDWEFtlS07f8GkHULqwTUSJvYtGALqB9Ly1JHVK_dzFSd_HFoKLSdeZTdYH-sPN4tKudrBSPlw0at3uJv_YVmoHKQ64OH4JzoNtb0Qg026JwiVBhKfyVaDs076bCObpI905wnP4m4T8jC5ug5saPGPczZHxdnQRvRDmdB3zYanvqyY51p-g5Rm7h4iCsWPJw0JvJbCm3dRSYtrDfGwJKrqklXYbNQ2W0g00Qg6GQ)
Peter, my race is one of the most important in the country. My district elected President Trump by 15% in 2016. In 2018, Anthony Brindisi and his ultra-liberal donors stole our election. **Now, he votes with President Trump less than 10% of the time.**

We need to send someone to Washington who will stand with President Trump and fight back against do-nothing Democrats like Anthony Brindisi. New Yorkers deserve a member of Congress who will work in THEIR favor, not in favor of the Washington elite.

With your support, and Trump's support, I am more confident than ever that we will get back to work on the issues that matter to you and your family.

Please, make it happen by joining the team today: [**https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/join-1092308**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dec141faba0343548cdd3b4a312380ce&_e=iTUFHBDDPSWGnYb6xXJ94dnu_aU1cZTt-e68xVAoWdKdOKFIa0FjaHTY6ZkHL11KWlXvlCsJACcz6VpIZFK84JesuAlddgbW3E2XEMYDltqZnfZeZdrnoTae3uBZtQCHPYaUUc4a7z6c93asTSSYl5C8H6ERnOFWxkNq07zRrYH05vY_WQkuSOK_fhXD3_6D0unZRFRl_sZkdvjKaYa6Yu1sxDoKMWTlNhYjXO6a2JkClbC9dTYZqetepp-LLYInJXcaTD1bVSNlw2Av-M-nLXTLkDWEFtlS07f8GkHULqxrGtKaJTwIdUBUdADt_p9vK8lhjWzDcXu_8o8xuSw69s5lykA5c1685GUf0T_hAVtEBTc4QTPiCAWDLzikIYc1WcA9QTRNmZHmlXBaqzuh5K6ncVJ00hIZUaDzEqBoVlcjkHj2ObOwAnHVA2BvMwWtijaMEc8vakOc7t73nDLuHXe5JZyT3UVC2s0oGGKwWwX5iE-qTRRpUoKMERVceYcV)

Thanks you, Peter.
Claudia

body:
It was not too long ago that I was knocking on doors for then-Senator Obama in Nevada, during his first run for President of the United States. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zchnSWExfrGq9Qrh3Qr2ufR8TqdaKUDZZ-EibtM3vHwtLc64HYy-T450_qinUzniV6Iyg8C_LzgoiwWgEkyGX0tQNKKzQc3Zvc_T0oAuXi2hHATaGNmU7tunPlKpKHnEuok6v9E2eg0TwBNDHVhLxSHnXZAZicU2RzakwJa6zIfYAviqQZj4n3Vk7hWhUC4F5xYgcAyD4K3qaYuGZYqg927eq1-7kAGkU9SOE498s-ba18BuZnczib96wt9meXziPmsGIz_WEVd9cbDADqStQF_dqmyiigNkj308qDWhtfLT09nXp9bq73xJx26gmO_ArSXaIEDaOIOJP9XPQ3IAfl/340/YJyUcFVsTEe6Owl_ot6fdA/h0/1HK1CZEodQOsN4hu5r4m4j8x3CyE6il1r0absPSyYZQ)
Friend,
It was not too long ago that I was knocking on doors for then-Senator Obama in Nevada, during his first run for President of the United States.
One year later, I was a young staffer working for President Obama in the Department of Justice on judicial nominations and reforming our criminal legal system.
Today, I am humbled and honored to tell you that President Barack Obama just endorsed our campaign.
**_[Join President Obama in supporting our campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zchnSWExfrGq9Qrh3Qr2ufR8TqdaKUDZZ-EibtM3vHwqSsmrPdAPjkWqbAYYSCypnX-GkZqYrzrMhDN-SzpXtO8cxdHO0Eb_LS9nm8Kudyf9gXHKMJ-n-FFovZXfD4_4w4p8Gogu9t5havhGRdkgiwkAl5EJWjNRqmMyyVNYDaisReZ6JeXPq7nDudUfkCyEDBQqbq59-q6nvjsXJWFrw0hJDy1MDiikXzMtJ5NGojOO7P6-Sqs2slUeX_p-Pf0wBOI98AM_nZnI7w7z-TaL9txwamPQHUz9Tz__hxHGaY8GBHKszxUOuEGLVS9da9sMg4YimtIRy6eo4w4SZM21Ad/340/YJyUcFVsTEe6Owl_ot6fdA/h1/YzKqeVLt6EXG0t7x3FmZCKjotS3hkp_Hn211ttLq_eI)_**
In his first wave of endorsements, President Obama said: _“Together, these candidates will help us redeem our country’s promise by sticking up for working class people, restoring fairness and opportunity to our system, and fighting for the good of all Americans — not just those at the top.”_
I’ve said this before and I’ll say it again: growing up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, I never imagined that someone like me could run for Congress — let alone decisively win a competitive Democratic primary. But we’ve proven that anything is possible, if we do it together.

clean_body: It was not too long ago that I was knocking on doors for then-Senator Obama in Nevada, during his first run for President of the United States. | | | Friend, It was not too long ago that I was knocking on doors for then-Senator Obama in Nevada, during his first run for President of the United States. One year later, I was a young staffer working for President Obama in the Department of Justice on judicial nominations and reforming our criminal legal system. Today, I am humbled and honored to tell you that President Barack Obama just endorsed our campaign. In his first wave of endorsements, President Obama said: “Together, these candidates will help us redeem our country’s promise by sticking up for working class people, restoring fairness and opportunity to our system, and fighting for the good of all Americans — not just those at the top.” I’ve said this before and I’ll say it again: growing up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, I never imagined that someone like me could run for Congress — let alone decisively win a competitive Democratic primary. But we’ve proven that anything is possible, if we do it together. In solidarity, Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: Jason Yates
subject: Join Us: It’s time for godly men to lead for a better tomorrow
body:
| | My Faith Votes is live streaming this Wednesday!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200803com01&n=1)
| Peter, It’s time for a revival. More than ever before, it’s time for godly men to lead at this critical moment in our nation’s history. **I invite you to join me on Facebook and YouTube,_Wednesday, August 5, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT_ , for a virtual discussion with Ken Harrison, Chairman and CEO of Promise Keepers. ** _Promise Keepers_ is an incredible organization on a mission to encourage men to know their identity, purpose, and destiny in Christ and then link arms to influence the world for good...and for God. We will discuss the vital role Christian men play, not only in their own families but also in our communities. We will also share with you a fantastic new resource Promise Keepers has just released to help men as they lead their families. You can [RSVP to the online event](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200803com01&n=2), and mark your calendar for Wednesday, August 5, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200803com01&n=3) Pray. Think. Vote. Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200803com01&n=4)

Friend,

I know how difficult the past few months have been. Your unwavering support during this time has not gone unnoticed.

I am writing to you now, not to ask for a contribution, but to ask for your help.

We are all in this together, and while I know there has been some confusion surrounding the usage of face masks, I think it’s something we should all try to do when we are not able to be socially distanced from others.

I don’t love wearing them either. Masks may be good, they may be just okay, or they may be great. They can possibly help us get back to our American way of life that so many of us rightfully cherished before we were so terribly impacted by the China Virus.

My feeling is, we have nothing to lose, and possibly everything to gain, including the next chapter to our country, and to keep things open whether it be schools or businesses.

I recently tweeted that many view wearing a mask as a patriotic act, and there is no one more patriotic than me and you. Why not give it a shot!

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9137a99a6d1242fafc67c6bc3830156bc30c7f2949b86be5f6012689b845eb95c3988dd097f1bf1efaea11aa6433e4341b2de8e0931d5bc7
If you would like more information on the benefits of wearing a face mask, or information on how to get one, please follow this link. >>
Thank you,

subject: Highest-Ranking Combat Veteran to ever serve in Congress, Representative Jack Bergman, Backs Amanda Makki
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki For Congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=1f71dee7fd&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | **Highest-Ranking Combat Veteran Member in Congress,**
**Representative Jack Bergman, Backs Amanda Makki**
---
| **St. Petersburg, FL –** Today, the highest-ranking combat Veteran ever to serve in Congress, Representative Jack Bergman (R-MI), announced his endorsement for Amanda Makki, Republican primary candidate.

“Amanda Makki is the exact person we need in Washington to defend American values and bring back true leadership for Pinellas County. For far too long, Democrats have tried to dismantle the opportunity for others to achieve the American Dream. We can count on Amanda’s story to continue to inspire others to work hard and never give up on a hope for a better life for themselves or their children,” said Bergman.

“It is a great honor today to be endorsed by a man of great patriotism and leadership. Representative Bergman is a strong voice in Washington when it comes to defending American values and the Constitution. In a time where law and order is needed most – I would be honored to work alongside him in Congress and protect the America we know and love,” said Makki.

As the Republican frontrunner candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District, Amanda Makki has received the endorsements from esteemed military veterans including Senator Joni Ernst, the first female combat veteran ever elected to the United States Senate, Congressmen Michael Waltz (Lt. Colonel), Congressman Neal Dunn (Major), and Combat veteran Robert O’Neill of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6.

In addition, she is endorsed by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, Republican Whip Steve Scalise, Health Care Ranking Member and Physician Michael Burgess, as well as Florida Congressional Representatives John Rutherford and Neal Dunn. Locally, Amanda has the support of Seminole City Councilor Thom Barnhorn, Belleair Beach Mayor Joseph Manzo and Treasure Island Commissioner Tyler Payne. She was named to the National Republican Campaign Committee’s Young Guns program as one of the top “Contender” candidates.

Additionally, Amanda has received over 25 major endorsements including The American Conservative Union, the Conservative groups FreedomWorks, Republican Main Street Partnership PAC, and Maverick PAC as well as groups supporting the strongest female candidates in the U.S. including VIEW PAC, Maggie’s List, and Rep. Elise Stefanik’s E‐PAC, that helps female GOP candidates. She is also supported by the American College of Emergency Physicians and Associated Builders & Contractors Florida Gulf Coast Chapter.

---
| ###

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18531627/231492315/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODdiNzliZS1jZWQ1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HXUfl6BRpdknIKPTarj9kuqIiLcsavo5RAlVNnNJAg=&emci=eec9b1b7-ced5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=887b79be-ced5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Hey, it's Kendall – communications and research director for Team Espy. After failing to pass additional relief for struggling families and unemployed workers (and then taking off for another three-day weekend), guess who Cindy Hyde-Smith was just spotted with? Betsy DeVos. That’s right: **Hyde-Smith met with Education Secretary DeVos just days ago to discuss COVID-19 and our children’s schools.** DeVos recently threatened to withhold federal funding from schools that don’t fully reopen in-person this fall, with the White House press secretary telling reporters, _"The science should not stand in the way."_ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18531628/231492316/-169304145?refcode=em-200803-devos&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODdiNzliZS1jZWQ1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HXUfl6BRpdknIKPTarj9kuqIiLcsavo5RAlVNnNJAg=) Not only are they failing to respond to this public health crisis, but DeVos is actively going against health experts' warnings and ignoring science altogether. And Cindy-Hyde Smith is meeting with her! Our students, teachers, faculties, and families in Mississippi and all across the country need a plan and resources to ensure our children can get their education in the safest way possible. We need a real leader in the Senate who will stand up for the health and well being of our nation’s families and educators, and not bow to political pressure from special interests and party leaders.
