clean_body: | Hey, it's Kendall – communications and research director for Team Espy. After failing to pass additional relief for struggling families and unemployed workers (and then taking off for another three-day weekend), guess who Cindy Hyde-Smith was just spotted with? Betsy DeVos. That’s right: Hyde-Smith met with Education Secretary DeVos just days ago to discuss COVID-19 and our children’s schools. DeVos recently threatened to withhold federal funding from schools that don’t fully reopen in-person this fall, with the White House press secretary telling reporters, "The science should not stand in the way." = Not only are they failing to respond to this public health crisis, but DeVos is actively going against health experts' warnings and ignoring science altogether. And Cindy-Hyde Smith is meeting with her! Our students, teachers, faculties, and families in Mississippi and all across the country need a plan and resources to ensure our children can get their education in the safest way possible. We need a real leader in the Senate who will stand up for the health and well being of our nation’s families and educators, and not bow to political pressure from special interests and party leaders. With your help, Mike Espy can and will be that leader for Mississippi . If you can, pitch in a contribution of $10 or more to support our people-powered campaign to send Mike to Washington to fight for us – not cozy up to DeVos like our opponent. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Kendall W. Communications and Research Director Espy for Senate Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

body:
Chinese embassies and consulates are being used to harvest information, spy on American citizens, and track down Uighur muslims that have fled China [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=4ce0c2307b3e408fbca0f82220587aac&_e=yo9ZHCLOc-KDe0_uRRm-ncexwN0Cx72_KPv9qmrh4jFFq-TG25gTfW4nOr_TXWRFbcTIS6OqxmlD0jZWmHeagKX_6MlwhUOT84oIedo_d6OKAp5QBA5UuxjhzgsZnFTp0Y_nGhS5SMI8GPDMsKJevkZOg5EMe20viprSW6dS_J9p7oGObcm8jLFDW9PkGinR3ocY-s3D2GmDwD4_DugE6V6jOul3EODKtJclqpcP7SN7Z91k7lBzkCSwAB3S3QFrK6ou_vpfdjXRsd0a7cvrGn8Tj1TxmE8fc166Tr2-XRV7Aj35_-swFKZGZDi9yPfN7uGc-9_75JyklKi98Jf1QXax91HrADsFyRDwR6aydFBQ3XqtCfmE-xrQGyS6AbjWf9xwg2PfFGkazp0WQHZXgKx2CjyUrTuVGAciDfJyGwplitWkKanrO00YMFGWdxPC5Pxp2eM0SiFx-VKCSSa0jgpoM3ayLVA3VgtBevPbiAg%3D) | |
---
Friend,

With so much going on right now, it’s easy for major, groundbreaking stories to fall between the cracks. As a member of the House China Task Force, it's important to me that we bring attention to this issue that isn’t being talked about enough.
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=4ce0c2307b3e408fbca0f82220587aac&_e=yo9ZHCLOc-KDe0_uRRm-ncexwN0Cx72_KPv9qmrh4jFFq-TG25gTfW4nOr_TXWRFbcTIS6OqxmlD0jZWmHeagKX_6MlwhUOT84oIedo_d6OKAp5QBA5UuxjhzgsZnFTp0Y_nGhS5SMI8GPDMsKJevkZOg5EMe20viprSW6dS_J9p7oGObcm8jLFDW9PkGinR3ocY-s3D2GmDwD4_DugE6V6jOul3EODKtJclqpcP7SN7Z91k7lBzkCSwAB3S3QFrK6ou_vpfdjXRsd0a7cvrGs4rHqo7J2dJlv88RfzccBKhrlBfTR1rIQOHVlPfSl_5J2D1x5kpXx6N6kz969GDvT--4QMxsB89XwKKtDlBWRNY04GAWqtVoMnL0gJT6JwjGUeeIyybZ7Rsal-fc41_05RJEOraO3Rr8do690ROSmGRO7ccn8auKxnmN0b-c7gOuqCYBXVuy220VVJLJbt5O3ockxb88a9GLpq_AIfrBtk%3D)
The Chinese Communist Party is using consulates on American soil to spy on our citizens and to harvest valuable, protected intellectual property from our companies.

It gets worse.

Our intelligence agencies have reported that the CCP is using consulates around the world to track down any Uighur muslims that have fled China as they double-down on their human rights abuses being committed against them.

This is exactly why President Trump ordered the closure of the Houston consulate – but with tension between the U.S. and China peaking right now, I want to know where you stand on this issue:

**Do you support President Trump’s decision to shut down the Chinese consulate in Houston?**
[**YES, I SUPPORT CLOSING THE HOUSTON CONSULATE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=4ce0c2307b3e408fbca0f82220587aac&_e=yo9ZHCLOc-KDe0_uRRm-ncexwN0Cx72_KPv9qmrh4jFFq-TG25gTfW4nOr_TXWRFf_0k6tC5pMU__MiSwonFu0sLvtunOYSN67SKrJJmb0uTcZSbzYyuQ66A8XH3Uk2pR9hkD8BPCzWvhvonj4SB_WA-BvXoGXL7_Q4rSVxjoE_xy62lHnn41y0HW-0MuPZXMbsLjUcRE_xbKbH-Vfq10Ne8GLES91dZaqMwGagXwI6YR6RzI9y6Ae2L9Jta7iTjok6vWch8AGTGhvCgy5PyU6r3EiYst4_0K4EJj-_3ClzqjQr8-gy9P6IVXoEpCD-nOmSB7BhwiFw592wq2620WTbPso-k-Su4jKNAyqS2TeVxvxWDCakY1OzJqDEGT44v4JPS5cpWEjNe-z1D6787EhhAU6jLctdj_z9B0iiKPThi5o6kMii8V1keJu3DDme-_CFW9GXUfQ39wM7-NkOaUFY-AndhRRqrt10QJ4uueVQwFPgt8Z58I1Vu-ZcOlPj7ZmcIFXID5pm5KSZ-U7LgPWePhE3MuveTQArPyKVHgfTj8ls6SISr2avRldd560vA)
[**NO, I DON’T SUPPORT CLOSING THE HOUSTON CONSULATE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=4ce0c2307b3e408fbca0f82220587aac&_e=yo9ZHCLOc-KDe0_uRRm-ncexwN0Cx72_KPv9qmrh4jFFq-TG25gTfW4nOr_TXWRFf_0k6tC5pMU__MiSwonFu0sLvtunOYSN67SKrJJmb0uTcZSbzYyuQ66A8XH3Uk2pR9hkD8BPCzWvhvonj4SB_WA-BvXoGXL7_Q4rSVxjoE_xy62lHnn41y0HW-0MuPZXMbsLjUcRE_xbKbH-Vfq10Ne8GLES91dZaqMwGagXwI6YR6RzI9y6Ae2L9Jta7iTjok6vWch8AGTGhvCgy5PyU6r3EiYst4_0K4EJj-_3ClzqjQr8-gy9P6IVXoEpCD-nOmSB7BhwiFw592wq2620WTbPso-k-Su4jKNAyqS2TeW35zoOwEHzdBNUCQ1LaVQdZLaV-4ea8wOwsO-kwnvZhGD1CxLWaQMYWyN0FS7hzCusDvLWvTGj-CSoNE3pGWJTwEcMt4cwlMdyeGkkVw_e6JACedF3Glm4Tc76-jGQcse6WmKlFOMvK33ZmwmafeLwpTT4fr7bhfYX5T0135n6FgWm29bMzki7X5_13NAC36V33IyhMTNNSpcpQ54ZiXVT)

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Need 50,000 signatures before midnight to protect Obamacare. Add your name >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Donald Trump's administration filed a brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in favor of getting rid of all of the Affordable Care Act. |
---
Peter,

In the midst of a global pandemic, Donald Trump's administration filed a brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in favor of getting rid of _all_ of the Affordable Care Act.

Trump's move could strip millions of Americans of their health insurance, and once again allow insurance companies to deny coverage or increase premiums for people with pre-existing conditions like asthma, cancer, and diabetes.

**It 's despicable, Peter. Health care is a right, not a privilege.**

Joe Biden is fighting to save Obamacare's protections for folks with pre-existing conditions, and, as president he will work to build on the Affordable Care Act and give every American access to affordable health care.

[If you stand with Joe Biden today, will you add your name to protect the Affordable Care Act?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56d1/4208047196/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS") | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56d1/4208047196/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS")
---
Health care is personal to Joe Biden. That's why he worked side-by-side with President Obama to pass the Affordable Care Act.

And it's why he released a plan to give every American a new choice -- a public option like Medicare, lower prescription prices, and end "surprise medical billing."

But Donald Trump is still going to use every angle he can find to dismantle the ACA and destroy our chance to build on it.

Not even a global public health crisis could stop him, so we know he won't give up.

**We need 50,000 people to sign this petition before midnight and speak up for the 100 million Americans with pre-existing conditions who could have their protections taken away if Trump succeeds.**

[So, Peter, if you believe that nobody ‐‐ especially in the midst of a pandemic ‐‐ should be worried about whether they can afford health care, will you take action today?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56d1/4208047196/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS")
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56d1/4208047196/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-defend-aca?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.06.25_B3_acapetition_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS")
---
Thanks for speaking up today,

JoeBiden.com

---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56cc/4208047196/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56c8/4208047196/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56ca/4208047196/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba25/1cd0ac28/17b84b432/357d56c5/4208047196/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Tomorrow
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/tomorrow?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# Tomorrow is the day! All of our hard work comes down to tomorrow’s primary and I need to ask you for one more favor.

Your work in letting your friends and family know about our campaign and our message has been a big help. I need to ask you to do this one more time to help us Get Out The Vote for tomorrow. Please let your friends and family across Kansas know about why you support our campaign and our message.

Let them know about how I plan to shift power away from the Washington insiders and back to We The People. Talk about how I am a businessman who wants to serve his community and that I believe in term limits. Mention how I want to preserve our nation’s heritage and protect public safety. Talk about my commitment to growing our rural communities and agriculture economy. Mention how I have run a positive campaign when my opponents have engaged in negative campaigns.

Share our [endorsement from the _Wichita Eagle_.](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=a673832a40&e=41f8e27552)

Share our social media ([Facebook](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=d6cfa1263b&e=41f8e27552), [Twitter](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=692ef421b6&e=41f8e27552), [Instagram](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=70d9b2b957&e=41f8e27552)) on your social media. If you need help finding your polling place, [click here](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=83c5454304&e=41f8e27552).

We cannot do this without you and together we can win tomorrow and head on to November to beat Barbara Bollier and keep Kansas red!

Dave

_P.S. – Please join us tomorrow night for our election watch party at 6:30 p.m., location below. _

# Kanza Hall
7300 W. 119th Street
Overland Park, KS
---
| | | | | | | [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=058692631a&e=41f8e27552)

Lindstrom for Senate1310A Westloop Pl # 353Manhattan, KS 66502-2842

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:

|

| | Thank you -- we saw a surge in contributions over the past few days, and as a result, we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal! There's no time to slow down. There are only three months left to connect with voters in the Triad before Election Day. Due to the health crisis, we can't connect with folks in person or get out the vote like we normally would. So here's how we're going to do it: We're going to spread our message as far and wide as possible with mail, digital ads, virtual events, phone and textbanking, and on social media. **If you 're ready to flip North Carolina's 6th for the first time in 30 years, this is where you can start: Follow us on [_Facebook_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d299/3d199a51/2f5471f4/7364a130/1067956962/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.facebook.com/KathyManningNC/") and [_Twitter_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d299/3d199a51/2f5471f4/7364a131/1067956962/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://twitter.com/KathyManningNC") for updates and to share our campaign for NC-06 with your friends, family, and followers.** | | | [FACEBOOK](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d299/3d199a51/2f5471f4/7364a130/1067956962/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.facebook.com/KathyManningNC/")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Friend, watch our new ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We have big news — we just released our first TV ad of election season, and we need your help to get it in front of as many Hoosiers as possible | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

We have big news — we just released our first statewide TV ad of 2020, and we need your help to get it in front of as many Hoosiers as possible**[(watch here)](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8b182cba2cfe4454b1d7a7e7a676504e&_e=RxfcJXyOj169jQh5IW1l6repFeNbaeDh5snWMuR9Guh0t-MrY3Swlymycqd5sIWKY4rs3hqc4YkMl8rI1xz5Xpex2JNjxqZBlRDbjD1OtXT6f8W8g11ShkLZdnpdMPGSNJViKHXevgxbzEwHEIaXMjpUUCzhsflUOmjQitTv7WJhcYU-r7EVv4jQsJruHzXLskv6Pe9d28jcWqaEggHAfEoDtbv2Zwi0X3hLNhhERDUToaax6-lWbnPXInikxDwq5RDLU-TQbS6JBLzVj7zpK27gdNkI6fCEuDTodlrvcllscqHxjzSOIugy8w_jehCt_9-TbSmv_T5Re2eHXHXRI_gNRXXZyNszz9pInHYH7Rc-x_3kYA4nYTVaUhww52fcX6KjPfCaKXUDuNpgg3u7DEbLkp6NWe1HRUmUql5J0eA7xsbzZLOcN_nzS6-P7PwmMt8XitKolpEQHtuApVwaiJW3B_jkrfNYx7-5YX1PmFg%3D)**.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8b182cba2cfe4454b1d7a7e7a676504e&_e=RxfcJXyOj169jQh5IW1l6repFeNbaeDh5snWMuR9Guh0t-MrY3Swlymycqd5sIWKY4rs3hqc4YkMl8rI1xz5Xpex2JNjxqZBlRDbjD1OtXT6f8W8g11ShkLZdnpdMPGSNJViKHXevgxbzEwHEIaXMjpUUCzhsflUOmjQitTv7WJhcYU-r7EVv4jQsJruHzXLskv6Pe9d28jcWqaEggHAfEoDtbv2Zwi0X3hLNhhERDUToaax6-lWbnPXInikxDwq5RDLU-TQbS6JBLzVj7zpK260WWhPorLOMxqkLjCk-mPlTZ2idmx8v25fVNW3qMoWUJ18FDjp0O-pfAtzF6KPAZyzJKcV-08aTKb172X1eiFoSnGdpjKYuDrpRYm2EBqeiLdyWSQYoaxFwSTNVhOYijZJ2HoI9Ojdz6J4yaLaR7xaX3TyvDJK17rLNM9Z25XV4kAZd84ExlKtTCpnABLK8xv7P-8kZF62xyguhDWfqDo%3D)
Like Eric said, we’re a strong and resilient group of Hoosiers. We’ve faced our fair share of challenges, but we’re proud of how we stepped up to meet them head on.

We’ve come together as a community, and it’s been inspiring to see Hoosiers from all walks of life and every corner of our state come through for their neighbors in need.

**Simply put, we couldn’t be more proud to be Hoosiers. **

Eric can’t wait to spend another four years working to build One Indiana for All, but he needs to spread his message to as many Hoosiers as possible. Starting tomorrow, this ad will be airing on TV statewide, but that’s not enough.

_That’s where you come in. _

Friend, will you watch our new ad and share it with your family and friends on social media?

subject: It's voting time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Tell your friends and family to get out and vote! | |
---
| | |
---
| It's hard to believe that primary election day is tomorrow. It seems like it wasn't that long ago that Jake and I made the prayerful decision for him to run for Congress. I can tell you I am so glad election day is finally here and we can at least temporarily get rid of all the negativity on our televisions and in our mailboxes.

I sincerely hope that you will take the time tomorrow to get to the polls and safely cast your ballot in this important Republican primary election.

Jake is ready to get to work for you as a leader who will go to Washington, D.C. and take the arrows in defense of the freedoms and liberties that have made this country what it is today.

Tell your friends and family to get out and vote!

With gratitude,

Suzanne LaTurner

Peter,

As of today, there are only three months to go until Election Day! Now that we're in the final stretch, we have some Texas-sized plans to reach undecided voters, **but we need your help to do it all. We're launching a vital one-day goal of $25,000 to make sure we'll have the resources we need to flip Texas in November -- will you chip in to help us reach it?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e8b/7f51f7bc/40c083cc/4ef7ae7b/1386317657/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1day-goal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200803.2nd__1835__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e8b/7f51f7bc/40c083cc/4ef7ae7a/1386317657/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1day-goal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200803.2nd__1835__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e8b/7f51f7bc/40c083cc/4ef7ae79/1386317657/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1day-goal?refcode=email_20200803.2nd__1835__")**
With your support we'll be able to:
| ★ | Flip Texas, take control of the Senate, and kick Mitch McConnell out of the Senate Majority Leader's office.
---|---|---
| ★ | Protect Texans' health, expand access to affordable care, and ensure that people with pre-existing conditions don't face discrimination.
| ★ | **Show Sen. Cornyn that a winning campaign can be built with the power of people -- not special interests and corporate PACs.**
MJ can win in November, but she needs your help to do it. **[Will you donate today to help us reach our one-day $25,000 goal and turn Texas blue?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e8b/7f51f7bc/40c083cc/4ef7ae00/1386317657/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1day-goal?refcode=email_20200803.2nd__1835__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e8b/7f51f7bc/40c083cc/4ef7ae00/1386317657/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1day-goal?refcode=email_20200803.2nd__1835__&amount=10")

|

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e8b/7f51f7bc/40c083cc/4ef7ae7f/1386317657/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

| Friend --

Donald Trump knows Jackie Walorski is in trouble in the race for Indiana’s 2nd District, which is why he re-tweeted his endorsement of Jackie on Twitter on Friday. He and the rest of the Republican party are seeing the momentum our campaign is gaining as a threat to a seat they once thought was completely safe.

We’ve got news for them, Jackie’s seat isn’t hers, and we’re taking it back.

name: POLL ALERT - via Team Ossoff
subject: Friend, this race is going down to the wire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
And it will decide control of the U.S. Senate. |
---
Hi friend,

With exactly three months to go until Election Day, Jon Ossoff's Georgia Senate race is the _MOST COMPETITIVE_ in the country. **A poll released yesterday has Jon within the margin of error of defeating David Perdue in November!**

_This comes on the heels of another poll last week showing Jon STATISTICALLY TIED with Perdue -- and a week earlier, our internal polling had Jon UP by a point._

**Friend, this race is going to decide control of the U.S. Senate -- and with Election Day just around the corner, it's a complete TOSS-UP.**

**[Can you chip in $20 right now to help Jon Ossoff retake the lead?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2016/5b2c1286/3e43f37c/25f13656/890769774/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_new_poll_v1?refcode=em_2020_08_03_new_poll_v1&amount=20")**

Mitch McConnell knows that Jon is an anti-corruption crusader who will fight to end the system that's kept politicians like him in power.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I'm at the polls . . .
body:
Eighteen early voting locations have opened up in my district and my volunteers and I are hitting them all today and over the next 12 days as early voting continues.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386888-912104-5124597-4863a70b28-33ceff07ae)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386888-912104-5124597-4863a70b28-33ceff07ae) Eighteen early voting locations have opened up in my district and my volunteers and I are hitting them all today and over the next 12 days as early voting continues.

[**Can you chip in $10 to help cover gas and signs for our volunteers?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386888-912104-5124596-c498812032-33ceff07ae)

I can’t believe we’re just 15 days away from the Florida Primary!

Our ad blitz has been effective and I’ve already talked to hundreds of voters – and many of them are voting in their first primary!

We’ve done our best to conserve our campaign budget for the general election, however, we need to cover basic costs for the primary – mainly polling signs and supplies for our volunteers.

It’s going to cost us about $2,850 to get our signs printed.

[**If you can help out with a $10 donation**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386888-912104-5124596-c498812032-33ceff07ae), I’d really appreciate it.

I’ll email you tomorrow and let you know how the first day went!

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: ..Washington Elites
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Did you see who Susan Wild’s LATEST endorsement is from? None other than former-president Barack Obama. On top of Obama’s endorsement, Nancy Pelosi... Peter, Did you see who Susan Wild’s LATEST endorsement is from?
None other than former-president Barack Obama. On top of Obama’s endorsement, Nancy Pelosi’s ally Susan Wild has also received endorsements from:

❌Nancy Pelosi herself ❌Senator for New York Kirsten Gillibrand ❌Former Presidential Candidate Amy Klobuchar ❌Far-Left Emily’s List, and last, but certainly not least, ❌Abortion Center Planned Parenthood
This is a list I never, ever want to get near. Meanwhile, Susan Wild is touting each of these endorsements, and being a part of Obama’s so-called ‘Legacy’.
You know what Obama’s left us with? American troops in Afghanistan, a dangerous Iran Deal, a total FAIL that was Obamacare – and elitist politicians like Susan Wild. Peter, I am not only proud, but honored to have the endorsements I have. Names like Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, Nikki Haley, and Steve Scalise are at the top of my list -- leaders who have helped move American forward and put the people first.
Over the next few days, Susan Wild’s announcement of her endorsement from former President Barack Obama will bring MILLIONS into her campaign -- but Peter, that doesn’t intimidate me. That just makes me want to UP THE ANTE.
**[For the next 48 hours, I have decided to offer a DOUBLE match on every single donation that is contributed to our clean_body: Did you see who Susan Wild’s LATEST endorsement is from? None other than former-president Barack Obama. On top of Obama’s endorsement, Nancy Pelosi... Peter, Did you see who Susan Wild’s LATEST endorsement is from? None other than former-president Barack Obama. On top of Obama’s endorsement, Nancy Pelosi’s ally Susan Wild has also received endorsements from: ❌Nancy Pelosi herself ❌Senator for New York Kirsten Gillibrand ❌Former Presidential Candidate Amy Klobuchar ❌Far-Left Emily’s List, and last, but certainly not least, ❌Abortion Center Planned Parenthood This is a list I never, ever want to get near. Meanwhile, Susan Wild is touting each of these endorsements, and being a part of Obama’s so-called ‘Legacy’. You know what Obama’s left us with? American troops in Afghanistan, a dangerous Iran Deal, a total FAIL that was Obamacare – and elitist politicians like Susan Wild. Peter, I am not only proud, but honored to have the endorsements I have. Names like Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, Nikki Haley, and Steve Scalise are at the top of my list -- leaders who have helped move American forward and put the people first. Over the next few days, Susan Wild’s announcement of her endorsement from former President Barack Obama will bring MILLIONS into her campaign -- but Peter, that doesn’t intimidate me. That just makes me want to UP THE ANTE. We will put every dollar brought in toward advancing the conservative agenda right here in PA-07, ensuring that come November, our Constitutional freedoms will ring true in the Lehigh Valley! Will you join me? Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Biden for President
subject: I'm sure you've seen the news about Joe's running mate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We've got a plan to win this thing with an incredible ticket. |
---
Peter, we're about two weeks away from the start of the Convention, so I know interest in who Joe Biden will choose as his running mate is nearing its peak.

While I can't say when exactly he'll announce (or who he'll pick), what I can tell you is this: There are a number of sharp, thoughtful, and, yes, ambitious women up to the task of working alongside him every day to win this race and unite our country. Our job over the next 92 days is to do everything we can to support them as they make the case to folks all across the country for their vision of empathy, equality, and fulfilling the promise of America for everyone.

**So the ask I have for you today could not be more urgent: I 'm calling on all of us to push harder every day to ensure that Joe Biden and his running mate win this November. That starts right here, right now.**

**[I'm asking you to put your full support behind Joe Biden and his future running mate. We won't win this race with you sitting on the sidelines, Peter. Peter, we only have 92 days left to do everything in our power to beat Donald Trump. I know we're all waiting with bated breath to see who Joe Biden chooses as his running mate, but we can't wait until that announcement comes to build the arsenal of support the two of them will need to win. We have to make every single day count.

We've got a plan to win this thing with an incredible ticket, but it's going to take an enormous amount of money to fund the ads and voter outreach we need to get the job done, because we're not taking a single vote for granted.

This campaign has been powered by folks like you from the beginning, but if we're going to make it to November with enough resources to bring home a win, I need you to step up and take your support to the next level.

I know $5 may not sound like much, but when you join millions of other members of Team Joe in pitching in, it makes a huge difference in the work we're able to do to defeat Donald Trump.

**Will you make your first contribution of $5 today to elect Joe Biden and his running mate?**

Thanks for everything you do. Together, we're charging full speed ahead toward November 3rd.

Onward,

Jen O'Malley Dillon

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump just signed an executive order to protect American jobs from foreign labor
body:
President Trump took action earlier today to prevent Americans from being displaced by foreign workers and offshore labor using federal dollars. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f21d9f4fdf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 3, 2020
---
| | |
# President Trump just signed an executive order to protect American jobs from foreign labor

**President Trump** took action earlier today to prevent Americans from being displaced by foreign workers and offshore labor using federal dollars.

**The new executive order** combats the misuse of H-1B visas, which too often have been exploited to replace qualified U.S. workers with lower-cost foreign ones. President Trump is directing all federal agencies to focus on hiring Americans for lucrative federal contracts, and it requires that only U.S. citizens be appointed to the government’s competitive service.

🎬 [**President Trump: No American worker should ever be replaced**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b1bf2dcf9&e=3ee4985eea)

**The decision comes** following news that the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA)—created in 1933 as part of President Franklin Roosevelt’s New Deal—planned to outsource 20 percent of its technology jobs to companies based in foreign countries. That action alone would’ve put more than 200 American jobs at risk.

**Even worse,** outsourcing hundreds of jobs during a global pandemic would be especially detrimental to these workers, their families, and their communities.

**Then today, something remarkable** happened. During the meeting to sign the executive order, President Trump was informed that TVA CEO Jeff Lyash had just called and “indicated a very strong willingness to reverse course” on the outsourcing plan.

**Thanks to today’s order** , other American workers will be protected going forward, too. “We're not just solving your problem,” Vice President Mike Pence told workers gathered at the White House today. “What the President's committing to today is to end the abuse of our worker visa program, once and for all.”

🎬 [**WATCH: President Trump reacts to call from TVA CEO**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42b0fc4938&e=3ee4985eea)

**LEARN MORE:**[**President Trump continues to put American workers first!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05b4b3ebe0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump to police officers: ‘You’re not allowed to do your job. That’s the problem.’**

**President Trump** met with leaders from the National Association of Police Organizations on Friday, where he told law enforcement officers that the Trump Administration stands behind them 100 percent.

**Law enforcement** has become a favorite target for both radical politicians and far-left protesters, who are calling to “defund” or “abolish” police departments nationwide.

**“It’s common sense,”** President Trump said, criticizing Democrat-run cities that are backing rioters over the police. “You’re not allowed to do your job. That’s the problem.”

🎬 [**Police officers have a champion in President Trump**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=918ac7b2ee&e=3ee4985eea)

**This year alone,** Chicago has seen more than 2,200 shootings. New York City has witnessed over 700. Meanwhile, murders in Philadelphia have risen by 32 percent, and Minneapolis has seen its homicide rate double.

**These are just a few** of the major cities that have seen violence skyrocket over the past few months as Democrat leaders look to appease rioters by scaling back policing.

**“In 10 minutes** you could’ve stopped it,” President Trump told law enforcement leaders, referring to the recent violence in New York City. “And you would’ve saved a lot of lives, and a lot of anger, and a lot of hardship.”

🎬 [**President Trump: “I actually think they’re afraid of these people”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0ccede68a&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ** : [**The President’s full remarks to law enforcement leaders**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=caf3eedb82&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: President Trump took action earlier today to prevent Americans from being displaced by foreign workers and offshore labor using federal dollars. | | | | | The White House • August 3, 2020 | | | President Trump just signed an executive order to protect American jobs from foreign labor President Trump took action earlier today to prevent Americans from being displaced by foreign workers and offshore labor using federal dollars. The new executive order combats the misuse of H-1B visas, which too often have been exploited to replace qualified U.S. workers with lower-cost foreign ones. President Trump is directing all federal agencies to focus on hiring Americans for lucrative federal contracts, and it requires that only U.S. citizens be appointed to the government’s competitive service. 🎬 The decision comes following news that the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA)—created in 1933 as part of President Franklin Roosevelt’s New Deal—planned to outsource 20 percent of its technology jobs to companies based in foreign countries. That action alone would’ve put more than 200 American jobs at risk. Even worse, outsourcing hundreds of jobs during a global pandemic would be especially detrimental to these workers, their families, and their communities. Then today, something remarkable happened. During the meeting to sign the executive order, President Trump was informed that TVA CEO Jeff Lyash had just called and “indicated a very strong willingness to reverse course” on the outsourcing plan. Thanks to today’s order , other American workers will be protected going forward, too. “We're not just solving your problem,” Vice President Mike Pence told workers gathered at the White House today. “What the President's committing to today is to end the abuse of our worker visa program, once and for all.” 🎬 LEARN MORE: | | President Trump to police officers: ‘You’re not allowed to do your job. ---
|
### **Future Generations is proud to have Donnie join us and launch some of the most ambitous plans for Alaska!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c87caf1aa5&e=66979298f9)
---
| Hello! I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to take a moment and introduce myself. My name is Donnie Johnson and I am the new Director for Future Generations PAC in Alaska! I’m joining Future Generations with over fourteen years of experience working with labor unions, political campaigns, and as a lobbyist for alternative energy legislation. Most recently I spent six months working as the Deputy National “Get Out the Vote” Director for Tom Steyer's presidential campaign. Previously I spent five years working for the National Education Association and its state affiliates. I started my political career working for President Barack Obama's historic 08' campaign as an organizer in Ohio, served as the Deputy State Field Director for the Ohio Democratic Party, and as Field Director for Senator Sherrod Brown's reelection campaign in 2012. Fast forward to today and I am thrilled to join Future Generations in their support of climate champion, Al Gross for United States Senate. Together we've built a coalition of grassroots organizations, working with key allies on mobilizing young voters and Native Alaskans to take action through data driven and digital organizing efforts. The Alaska Primaries is just 15 days away and we have a long list of action events planned with a number of allies who understand how important this 2020 election cycle is. **[First on this list is Flip the West and our event this Wednesday](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=47305f003d&e=66979298f9)! **Now we need your help to ensure Al is successful on August 18th and we must continue building on that momentum through the General Election. **[Are you ready to send Republican Dan Sullivan packing?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7714434e09&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d84e410752&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA")
---
|
---
|
# MEET DR. AL GROSS
---
| We are supporting Dr. Al Gross for U.S. Senate in Alaska and quickly have proven that this is one race you must keep your eye on!
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c519971f8c&e=66979298f9)
---
| **_We need all hands on deck! Election Day is Tuesday August 18th!_**
---
| We are asking you to join us this Wednesday at 5pm PDT for a phone bank with volunteers all over the country that understand the importance of the Alaska Senate race. You can sign up [**here**](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1cf85233ca&e=66979298f9) or by clicking the button below.
---
| [VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=94e0b373c1&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we must focus on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.**[ Will you invest today for seven generations into the future?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=595c74e91a&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c2dcf4f735&e=66979298f9)
---
| Starting this Wednesday, August 5th, we will be hosting a phone banking party with Flip the West at 5:00pm PDT with volunteers from all over the nation! Once you sign up you will receive a Confirmation Email from Flip the West with links to Zoom and the script.

RSVP HERE: [https://www.mobilize.us/flipthewest/event/293448/](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9b4531eef3&e=66979298f9)
#### What You'll Need
Chrome browser on your Mac or PC. Other choices such as Safari or Firefox, or your iPad, tablet or phone are not compatible with our automated dialing system. As you will be making calls from your computer, we suggest using ear buds with a microphone. In order to use Zoom, your computer needs to have a microphone with audio enabled. If your computer has a camera, enable it also. With your help we have a chance to do something special in Alaska please RSVP **[here](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=87b8c4d227&e=66979298f9).**
---
| [TIME TO FLIP ALASKA!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7c1f0abc41&e=66979298f9 "TIME TO FLIP ALASKA!")
---
|
---
|
### _ALASKANS FOR AL_
---
| | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9fa6dbd059&e=66979298f9)
---
This is the most important race you haven't heard of. Dr. Al Gross was our first endorsement because we saw the excitement and hope he brought Alaskans who are ready for change. Our ground game in Alaska is strong and we are ready to deliver a win on August 18th! We set out to build a national coalition of activists, organizations, volunteers, and a top-notch team at Future Generations. I am proud to report that we are on track to doing just that! Donnie has been an incredible addition to team and has already launched programs in Alaska that are making noise nationwide. We have a few surprise allies and events coming up! Make sure you tell all your friends to sign up to volunteer or donate to help Al across the finish line.
Roza Calderon, _Executive Director_
[Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
---
| [SPLIT A DONATION WITH FUTURE GENS & AL](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c433045739&e=66979298f9 "SPLIT A DONATION WITH FUTURE GENS & AL")

name: Ellen Foster, Campaign Manager
subject: Re: Mayor Pete's message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We're excited to have Pete Buttigieg's endorsement. |
---
Friend -- Did you see Pete's email yesterday?

**Jon and the whole team are thrilled to have Mayor Pete's endorsement.**

**_It's time for a new generation of leaders like Jon and Pete to clean up the mess in Washington._**

Right now, Jon is neck and neck in the polls with David Perdue. If Jon wins in Georgia, Democrats will take control of the Senate.

**[Please read Pete Buttigieg's note below, and chip in $10 right now to invest in Jon's surging campaign to turn Georgia blue.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13311/733106490/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Express Donate: $5](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13310/733106490/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_5")

| [Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13315/733106490/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_50")

Thanks!

Ellen Foster
Campaign Manager
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Pete Buttigieg
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** Sunday, August 2
**Subject:** Friend, Jon Ossoff can win in Georgia

Hi there,

As I said on the campaign trail, to turn the page on the current divisive Republican leadership and start a new chapter defined by unity and compassion, we don't just need to win the White House -- **_Democrats must retake the Senate too._**

To win back the Senate, to take the gavel out of Mitch McConnell's hands and break his grip on progress, Democrats need to net four seats this November.

**Jon Ossoff can win in Georgia, friend!**

**I'm proud to endorse my friend Jon Ossoff, and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure we elect bold candidates like Jon who will deliver generational change.**

**[Will you join me in supporting Jon by making a donation of $10 to help him win in Georgia and flip the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13311/733106490/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k&amount=10")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [Express Donate: $5](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13310/733106490/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_5")
---
| [Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13313/733106490/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_10")
---
| [Express Donate: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13312/733106490/VEsHBA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_20")
---
| [Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13315/733106490/VEsHBw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_50")
---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13314/733106490/VEsHBg/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13317/733106490/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k_ex_other")
---
With TWO competitive U.S. Senate races and Joe Biden leading Trump in the polls, _Georgia is THE battleground state in 2020_.

**And Jon's campaign is SURGING.**

In June, Jon shattered all-time turnout records with a landslide victory in the Democratic Primary.

Since then, he's pulled neck-and-neck with his Republican opponent, David Perdue.

Friend, Jon is on track to win this race. And then we'll have an inspiring young leader in the United States Senate -- someone who has made his career attacking corruption and the abuse of power.

But Jon can't do it without us.

**[Right now, will you pitch in $10 to elect Jon Ossoff and help flip the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13311/733106490/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k&amount=10")**
| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13311/733106490/VEsHAw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb_k&amount=10")
---
Thanks,

Pete Buttigieg
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13316/733106490/VEsHAg/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/less-emails-new") | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2014/5b2c1286/3e467eab/25f13319/733106490/VEsHDQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/content/unsubscribe")

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Support for small businesses
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Rhode Island's small businesses are the backbone of our economy. We've worked hard throughout this crisis to support local entrepreneurs, but there are still a lot of businesses in need of help. That's why I launched Restore RI to provide even more support to small businesses with a direct investment of $100 million. These funds, distributed in grants of up to $15,000, will help businesses facing reopening expenses such as plexiglass, cleaning supplies, and touchless pay technology, as well as fixed costs like rent and utilities. I'm excited to tell you that applications for the first round of funding are now available on the Rhode Island Commerce website: [commerceri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010YTlMucA1z1szT0-UA4_o27sg17eTCoyAdGpe54v1a--98DxnKuL3VcUsuT2PRWaGNfrrz37g69qUtxuTi4zwMNi72HKWd8dJfgGq9n7vZLvzr8w5hgxLWpKrwBymAIg-bTvFgphpr8nhiQdkoZBXQ==&c=2QYCvXaAlYKO0nqk9wG7EngHC0nb1rJL3iaPJhjbt_rszmBtXFnN4w==&ch=kgxR_SGaXWxgxmf1TbjgkGV0UOf4UrW-bYhqcep8uZlhJooIu7LDyw==).
---

| We're working hard to eliminate barriers so that every eligible small business is able to access these funds. Rhode Island Commerce is working with community organizations across the state to schedule training and technical assistance sessions for applicants. A listing of upcoming information sessions, virtual office hours, and Facebook lives can be found by visiting [www.commerceri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010YTlMucA1z1szT0-UA4_o27sg17eTCoyAdGpe54v1a--98DxnKuL3djwbp5lfF8AfHqKwB9b0GHQ8yfhtfXnn1I6xSSNqyE_yQ3Ttb3nQQB7FffI3QuMIoPqnZeERz3XZij-nvXwIJEeUTGma-jrLw==&c=2QYCvXaAlYKO0nqk9wG7EngHC0nb1rJL3iaPJhjbt_rszmBtXFnN4w==&ch=kgxR_SGaXWxgxmf1TbjgkGV0UOf4UrW-bYhqcep8uZlhJooIu7LDyw==) or on [www.facebook.com/CommerceRI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010YTlMucA1z1szT0-UA4_o27sg17eTCoyAdGpe54v1a--98DxnKuL3TeG8UTmJXuevj6UrKBD_d9KYfeCDzUt0xZFSomEHIPYU-Oonm0j_irGCOwU4SwODqJWZ3al3jOPNlneiXA31sQO00wcYat3VksIVlCgyfTF&c=2QYCvXaAlYKO0nqk9wG7EngHC0nb1rJL3iaPJhjbt_rszmBtXFnN4w==&ch=kgxR_SGaXWxgxmf1TbjgkGV0UOf4UrW-bYhqcep8uZlhJooIu7LDyw==).
In addition, for those applicants that might need access to technology, including printers, scanners, or computers, we've set up socially distanced work stations at the Rhode Island Commerce office in Providence. Appointments for this space are required and can be made [here.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010YTlMucA1z1szT0-UA4_o27sg17eTCoyAdGpe54v1a--98DxnKuL3TeG8UTmJXuexZh3mIeE1c3UDxX5kNUxoMJnMIIxuJBcPRf1XHi1qBIieIOBxkLsX11mcs2Cl6ukk3Ejilo7joms5szyTDn3bRpXr8crl9Vo2y6Cqkzc88_pK4ImjeQaXkKLlwD4SMt_Jdbbsz49DnF3gPP7fQs-Vw41ca2mAtPpI_XEmg1SZXlJEXGWrZ0QpQR5toM4BFrD&c=2QYCvXaAlYKO0nqk9wG7EngHC0nb1rJL3iaPJhjbt_rszmBtXFnN4w==&ch=kgxR_SGaXWxgxmf1TbjgkGV0UOf4UrW-bYhqcep8uZlhJooIu7LDyw==)
This money will both help business stay open and keep employees and customers safe. If you own a businesses, you can apply for assistance starting today on the Rhode Island Commerce website: [commerceri.com/about-us/restore-ri/](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010YTlMucA1z1szT0-UA4_o27sg17eTCoyAdGpe54v1a--98DxnKuL3TeG8UTmJXueoObte2iEmMYiZmpW0Y8VzTSHKoSgt6RZSuTdaBYqwhq9k8m8502OmHId79u217rkpxeZsqBuMOZtGHbw78hadSL9AgD1r6c3xtLQmMhIeuZbv3i1my4uNw==&c=2QYCvXaAlYKO0nqk9wG7EngHC0nb1rJL3iaPJhjbt_rszmBtXFnN4w==&ch=kgxR_SGaXWxgxmf1TbjgkGV0UOf4UrW-bYhqcep8uZlhJooIu7LDyw==)
This is just the first step. I'm excited to continue working together with business owners and community leaders to find more solutions to the problems our businesses are facing. If you need help for your business, reach out at [CommerceRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010YTlMucA1z1szT0-UA4_o27sg17eTCoyAdGpe54v1a--98DxnKuL3bonJxjHiOOeDRlzKO_7qxduWc9I9QbZIJyjpIn_Gg_5VWfl9S-6cM1WIqaYh4nUZ5saR--JOZIzakHl_Fe9r10jTTkOui1Fg8je2ys-yCOV_-be1X9M-khYtwVrHsfXdB8Rs-4y4jFhiALm9jrMQBuN8YFX8uzsKb60HW58Fnxsr_GxEQdP-VdsDLq2-Lyl2B0vwUsEUFqqq-f6-Qo5Bv_J1QW2ASEaSc9OY_hrT7p_YYwekK3CkK2l4DvR3atNfRBwhC55s43JSy9kwEdh51hISojajWCYsqyREfm1C3YMXwc_UGIc9XBnaZP8LBCkzNlaxaMItdDuY3W-azyiRGoK1P2Y9-HMytBYADk795kOxnpsmDM6T6geM6wquX2dUuzloCDvnMm042xwDE-YtSWKV0iZqeNBkvwkoWH3WUyjoFWpYYtM-8yw3MOSVt-zRni2r8QgBoLK&c=2QYCvXaAlYKO0nqk9wG7EngHC0nb1rJL3iaPJhjbt_rszmBtXFnN4w==&ch=kgxR_SGaXWxgxmf1TbjgkGV0UOf4UrW-bYhqcep8uZlhJooIu7LDyw==).

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Rhode Island's small businesses are the backbone of our economy. We've worked hard throughout this crisis to support local entrepreneurs, but there are still a lot of businesses in need of help. That's why I launched Restore RI to provide even more support to small businesses with a direct investment of $100 million. These funds, distributed in grants of up to $15,000, will help businesses facing reopening expenses such as plexiglass, cleaning supplies, and touchless pay technology, as well as fixed costs like rent and utilities. name: Adam Schiff
subject: why we need Joe Kennedy in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092b70/1243459405/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Friend -- You may not know this, but I was born and raised twenty minutes outside Boston. And growing up, I was inspired by the vision and voices of great leaders, presidents and senators from the great state of Massachusetts. And those powerful voices -- voices for change, voices for progress in our communities, and voices for good, moral leadership -- are needed today more than ever. That's why I'm supporting my friend Joe Kennedy, and endorsing his campaign for Senate. I can unequivocally state that Joe is one of the most powerful progressive voices in the Democratic Party today. From the moment he stepped foot on the House floor, I recognized Joe as a unique talent, as a shrewd legislator and tactician, and as a passionate warrior for justice. And I have seen how Joe has used his skill, talent and determination to fight Trump's abuses of power every single day of this presidency. Joe's voice for change is needed in the Senate now more than ever. He would use the great bully pulpit of a Massachusetts Senate seat -- and the powerful history it represents -- to demand accountability, action, and progressive change. In moments of great national urgency, like the COVID-19 pandemic or the recent protests for racial equality, Joe has been a champion for those struggling to get by and those struggling to overcome. Just like when Paul Ryan tried to rip health care away from millions of Americans or when Donald Trump started ripping children from their parents' arms at our southern border._Joe 's voice has lifted up millions of Americans. _ [**So, I 'm asking: With less than 30 days left before the September 1st primary, will you make a donation to elect Joe Kennedy and bring his leadership, commitment and progressive voice to the Senate in 2020?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092b71/1243459405/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkma-all-email-aug2020-fr-schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250,Other&amount=3") | _If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately:_
---
| **[$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-EG&express_lane=true&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

| **[$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-EG&express_lane=true&amount=25&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

| **[$100](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-EG&express_lane=true&amount=100&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

| **[$250](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-EG&express_lane=true&amount=250&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---
| **[Other](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-EG&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---
We are going to need our nation's best, brightest and boldest leaders to chart a course towards progress.
We're going to need Senators who bring everything they've got to the fights of a new generation: Healthcare as a human right. Bold action on climate change. Equality for all.
**We are going to need Joe.** So let's ensure he wins on September 1st by supporting him today:
| **[DONATE](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092b78/1243459405/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkma-all-email-aug2020-fr-schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SB-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250,Other&amount=3")**
---
Thanks for being a part of this fight.
Adam Schiff

| |
* * *

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092b79/1243459405/VEsHBQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092b7a/1243459405/VEsHBA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092b7b/1243459405/VEsHBw/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because Joe Kennedy is relying on you to help him take his fight for the basic dignity of every American family to the United States Senate. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request only to receive the most important emails [**here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092a84/1243459405/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") or you can unsubscribe **[here](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092a85/1243459405/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**. | [](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
---
Joe Kennedy has dedicated his career to social and economic justice. A former Peace Corps member, legal aid volunteer, and assistant district attorney, Joe is one of the Trump Era's most powerful voices for moral clarity in the Democratic Party. **[Will you help get his voice to the United States Senate by making a contribution today?](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

**[DONATE](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SB&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---

| Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907cd/55b66746/261c95ee/8092a80/1243459405/VEsHDQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

body:
We've just got three months left until Election Day -- are you with us?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e96/7f51f7bc/40c4b765/4ef7aef7/1839631925/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

We set a big one-day goal this morning to mark **exactly three months** until MJ defeats Sen. Cornyn. We need to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight to make some critical investments in the last few months, so we're **[asking everyone to donate $3 for the three months left until November 3rd.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e96/7f51f7bc/40c4b765/4ef7aef6/1839631925/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1day-goal?refcode=email_20200803.3nd__1844__&amount=3")**

MJ is running this race the right way -- powered by _people_ , not corporate PACs and special interests -- but that means we need your help.

So far we've raised $7,954 of our $25,000 goal, and we're only a third of the way through the day! If we keep up the pace we can hit our goal, but it's going to take _everyone_ stepping up! **Can MJ count on you?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
